caption: A woman with short blonde hair, wearing a black top, appears in a circular inset window on the left side of the screen. The main view shows a top-down perspective of a kitchen setting, featuring a light-colored tiled countertop. On the counter, there is a large metal mixing bowl, a silver fish, a red kitchen tool, and a rectangular metal baking tray containing some light-colored food remnants. In the top-left corner of the screen, the text "UCAR CENTER FOR SCIENCE EDUCATION" is visible next to a logo consisting of three wavy lines. Across the sequence, the scene remains static with very little movement. The woman in the inset remains in a similar position, staring toward the camera with a neutral expression, while the objects on the countertop stay still.
